subcodes.first_line: O my God and my Beloved! How am I to make mention of Thee with words, certain as I am that they themselves are created at Thy behest?
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا الهی و محبوبی کیف اذکرک بالکلمات بعد ایقانی بانها خلقت بامرک و ارادتک
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
